name: Tradeshift Supply Chain Platform API
what_it_does: Tradeshift REST API for cloud-based supply chain and B2B commerce platform. Enables AI agents to process and exchange e-invoices, manage supplier relationships, track payment workflows, access supply chain financing, and integrate Tradeshift into procurement and AP automation workflows. Tradeshift operates a large B2B commerce network connecting buyers and suppliers.
use_cases: Processing and exchanging e-invoices with suppliers from AP automation agents
Managing supplier onboarding and compliance from procurement workflow agents
Accessing early payment and supply chain financing data from treasury agents
Integrating Tradeshift invoice data into ERP and finance reporting agents
not_for: Simple single-vendor invoice without network effects
best_when: An enterprise using Tradeshift for supplier network and e-invoicing wants AI agents to automate invoice processing, manage supplier relationships, and integrate supply chain data into ERP workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: E-invoice processing errors cause payment discrepancies. PRIVACY: Supplier financial and contract data is commercially sensitive. Contact Tradeshift for developer access — not publicly available.

auth.notes: Tradeshift API uses OAuth 2.0 with authorization code flow. App registration in Tradeshift developer portal. Network account required for production access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise network pricing based on transaction volume
pricing.notes: Danish company. Developer sandbox available. Production requires Tradeshift network account.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: E-invoice processing errors cause supplier payment issues
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal registration
Danish company — strong EU focus, GDPR native, Peppol e-invoicing support
Developer sandbox available — use for testing before production
Tradeshift's network model means buyer-supplier relationships must be established on the platform
Supply chain finance features (early payment) have additional compliance requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Supplier invoice and payment data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. EU-native (Danish). EU-first data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Supplier invoice and financial data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. EU-native Danish company. Peppol e-invoicing.
